series_metadata.series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. Inspection Reports for Barbershops and barber school facilities by Barber Inspectors. The report may contain facility name, facility ID#, facility address, phone#, owner name and names of barbers/instructors working in the facilities, including signature of owner and/or managing barber. Report also includes inspection findings and any incompliances. Facilities are required to post the most recent inspection report until next inspection.
